primary_text:
It started with a simple question: why can't families buy food direct from the farms that grow it?

Not a subscription box. Not a middleman. A real grocery store where every product traces to a named regenerative farm.

FarmThru built it. A Brookvale hub. Partner farms across NSW. Food reaching families days after leaving the paddock.

Mid-2026, we're opening equity crowdfunding on Birchal. If you think food should work this way, be part of building it.

Not just a customer. A partner.
headline: We asked a simple question about food
description: FarmThru is opening equity crowdfunding on Birchal, mid-2026. Be part of it. Not financial advice.
creative_brief: Founder in the Brookvale hub, surrounded by fresh produce from named farms. Casual, warm. Text overlay with the founding question. Documentary tone.
